chunks.text: Hello friends, Welcome to Grid Smashers. Next example is

chunks.text: not starting with A or not ending with B.

chunks.text: In last video we discussed that containing A or at least A,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: starting with A, ending with A, starting with A and ending with B

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: we discussed these type of questions. But in this video

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: not starting with A and not ending with B.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Means first of all if we write its language,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: then which all will come in the language,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: not starting with A and not ending with B.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: So see if I talk about lambda or if I talk about epsilon means null,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: so see lambda or null will also be accepted in this.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Because neither it is starting with A nor it is ending with B.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Apart from this if we talk about only A or only B,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: if I talk about BA, means you have multiple strings here,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: but I will tell you that whenever you get question with NOT,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: means not starting with this or not ending with this,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: then you do it in a compliment way.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Compliment means you take out its compliment

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: or if I talk in a simple way, then you use D Morgan theorem here.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: What does D Morgan theorem say?

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: D Morgan theorem is A union B,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: if I take compliment then what will it become?

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: A compliment intersection, union's compliment intersection,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: intersection's compliment is union.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: So A compliment intersection B compliment.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: So in this way we will use D Morgan here.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: We have NOT starting with A.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: If I consider NOT starting with A as A,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: NOT starting with A, let's suppose it is A statement,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: NOT ending with B,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: let's suppose I consider this whole statement as B,

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: so this becomes my B.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: NOT starting with A means A, NOT ending with B means B.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: And what is in between? OR, what do we write OR? Union.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: That's it.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: So here if I take its compliment, then its compliment will be equal to

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: A compliment intersection B compliment.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: What does A compliment mean?

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: A means NOT starting with A.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: So what will be its compliment?

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Starting with A.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: What is its compliment?

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Starting with A.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: What is the compliment of union?

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Intersection.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: What is the meaning of union? OR.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: So what is the meaning of intersection? AND.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p
chunks.text: Next step B.

chunks.title: DFA of language with all strings Not starting with a OR Not ending with b DFA Example 480p

text: Hello friends, Welcome to Grid Smashers. Next example is Constructor DFA which accept a language of all strings not starting with A or not ending with B. In last video we discussed that containing A or at least A, starting with A, ending with A, starting with A and ending with B we discussed these type of questions.
